message: ci: use node 24 in web ci

files.patch:
@@ -36,7 +36,7 @@ jobs:
       - name: Setup Node.js
         uses: actions/setup-node@v4
         with:
-          node-version: 20
+          node-version: 24
           cache: 'pnpm'
           cache-dependency-path: 'web/pnpm-lock.yaml'
 
@@ -76,7 +76,7 @@ jobs:
       - name: Setup Node.js
         uses: actions/setup-node@v4
         with:
-          node-version: 20
+          node-version: 24
           cache: 'pnpm'
           cache-dependency-path: 'web/pnpm-lock.yaml'
 
@@ -124,7 +124,7 @@ jobs:
       - name: Setup Node.js
         uses: actions/setup-node@v4
         with:
-          node-version: 20
+          node-version: 24
           cache: 'pnpm'
           cache-dependency-path: 'web/pnpm-lock.yaml'
